name: floating-toolbar
title: Floating Toolbar
description: A floating, pill-shaped toolbar with a glass or solid background, spring entrance animation, tactile press feedback, and an optional selection highlight.
usage:
let toolbar = FloatingToolbar(items: [
    .init(icon: UIImage(systemName: "house.fill"))      { print("home") },
    .init(icon: UIImage(systemName: "magnifyingglass")) { print("search") },
])
view.addSubview(toolbar)
NSLayoutConstraint.activate([
    toolbar.centerXAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.centerXAnchor),
    toolbar.bottomAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.safeAreaLayoutGuide.bottomAnchor, constant: -16),
])

variants.title: Solid
variants.description: Opaque background that adapts to light/dark mode.
